Operatives.Name: Ink-Stains
Operatives.Description: Heavily armored shock troops trained for shock and suppression, not prolonged combat

Reputation.Description: Predatory model, primary antagonist to Cartel interests and independent captains

Steps.Name: The Intercept
Steps.Description: Massive, red, and heavily armed War Skiff blocks a trade lane or pulls alongside a target vessel

Steps.Name: The Hail
Steps.Description: Formal, officious announcement citing a fabricated violation

Steps.Name: The Shakedown
Steps.Description: False choice between destruction or signing a 'Voluntary Asset Forfeiture' document

Steps.Name: The Boarding Action
Steps.Description: Ink-Stains initiate a boarding action, using flash-bangs, tear gas, and shotguns to overwhelm and neutralize crew resistance

Steps.Name: The 'Severance'
Steps.Description: Captain and crew are executed or forced into indentured servitude or abandoned

Pillars.Name: Geopolitical Contracting
Pillars.Description: Deniable corporate mercenaries for major powers

Pillars.Name: The Crimson Shield Racket
Pillars.Description: Protection racket, offering clients a 'Crimson Shield Policy' for exemption from audits

Pillars.Name: Grey Market Fencing
Pillars.Description: Laundering and selling seized goods through black markets operated by the River Folk

Strengths.Name: Blood-Resin Armor
Strengths.Description: Exceptional protection, making them formidable opponents

Vulnerabilities.Name: Slow Speed
Vulnerabilities.Description: Vessels are slow and not designed for pursuit or rapid redeployment

Threats.Name: Economic Disruption
Threats.Description: Hindrance tactics can cripple time-sensitive supply chains

Threats.Name: Network Erosion
Threats.Description: Predation on smaller, independent captains weakens logistical network

Threats.Name: Corporate Infiltration
Threats.Description: Lord Valerius's potential acquisition of legitimate power within the Cartel represents an existential threat

Vulnerability Analysis.Name: Speed
Vulnerability Analysis.Description: Core weakness is their lack of speed, making them vulnerable to faster vessels

Recommended Actions.Name: Counter-Intelligence Focus
Recommended Actions.Description: Increase surveillance on the Red-Quill Broker network to anticipate Vaneer Concord-funded operations against Cartel-aligned shipping

Recommended Actions.Name: High-Priority Monitoring
Recommended Actions.Description: Establish a high-priority watch on Lord Valerius's financial activities, specifically any attempts to acquire shares or influence within the Cartel's corporate structure

Recommended Actions.Name: Tactical Doctrine Update
Recommended Actions.Description: Disseminate updated engagement protocols to all Cartel security fleets, emphasizing avoidance of Corsair broadside arcs and exploitation of their low maneuverability
